relics.name: Very Hot Cocoa
relics.description: Start each combat with an additional [blue]4[img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img][/blue].

relics.name: Ripple Basin
relics.description: If you did not play any Attacks during your turn, gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

relics.name: Anchor
relics.description: Start each combat with [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

relics.description: At the end of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Max HP.

relics.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]8[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].

relics.description: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold], you may add a card to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

relics.description: Transforms into a powerful [gold]Relic[/gold] after defeating [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Elites[/gold].

relics.description: Every [blue]5[/blue] cards you add to your [gold]Deck[/gold], heal [green]20[/green] HP.

relics.description: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] [gold]陨星[/gold] into [gold]流星雨[/gold].

relics.description: At the start of the next [blue]0[/blue] combats, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] your starting hand.

relics.description: Whenever you enter a shop room, heal [green]15[/green] HP.

relics.name: Bing Bong
relics.description: Whenever you add a card to your [gold]Deck[/gold], add one additional copy.

relics.name: Distinguished Cape
